bids.reasoning: At the opening with no opponent offers or messages yet, I am targeting my maximum utility bid. Since there is no time pressure at t=0.0, I should start firm on my preferred values across all issues and wait for the opponent’s response.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a very high-utility bid while making a small concession to avoid simply repeating my opening offer. The opponent’s only offer was all valueA, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and does not yet show meaningful concession, so I will hold firm especially on the high-weight issues D and E.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid around 0.98 because it is still very early at t=0.04 and there is no reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has repeated the all-valueA bid twice, which is extremely poor for me and shows no meaningful concession so far, so I will only make a small concession on a low-weight issue while holding firm on the most important issues D and E.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.96 because it is still very early in the negotiation and there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has mostly held at valueA for all issues, with only a small move to valueB on issueE, so I will concede only on my lower-weight issues while protecting the high-weight issues C, D, and E.

At t=0.08 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.94 rather than making major concessions. The opponent has mostly held at valueA, with only a small move on issueE to valueB, so I will concede only on low-weight issues while protecting the high-weight issueD and issueE. There are no opponent messages to factor in.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early at t=0.10 and there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has mostly held near all-valueA bids, with only small concessions on issueD or issueE, so I will concede modestly on my lower-weight issues A and B while protecting the high-weight issues C, D, and E.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.90 because it is still very early at t=0.12, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has mostly held near valueA but their latest offer improved issueE to valueC, suggesting some concession movement; I will concede only on low-weight issueA while holding the high-weight issues issueD and issueE at my best values.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.90 because it is still early at t=0.14, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me, with only small movement on issueD/issueE, so I will concede on a low-weight issueA while holding firm on the high-weight issues C, D, and E.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.88 because it is still early at t=0.16, while making a small additional concession on low-weight issues. The opponent’s offers have only slightly improved for me and remain concentrated near valueA, so I am holding firm on the important issues C, D, and E while varying my prior bid to avoid repeating it.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.86 because it is still early at t=0.18, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has mostly held firm at valueA on low/mid issues but recently conceded issueE to valueE, so I will hold my high-weight issues C/D/E at valueE while conceding further on the low-weight issueB to avoid repeating my prior bid.

I targeted a high but not maximal utility around 0.84, since it is still early at t=0.20 and there is no need to concede on my high-weight issues yet. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me and only show small concessions, so I am conceding mainly on my lowest-weight issues issueA and issueB while holding issueC, issueD, and issueE at my best values.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.80 because it is still early at t=0.22, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent has been holding mostly low values but recently improved issueE to valueD, which raises their offer utility to me; I will reciprocate with a modest concession on issueC while protecting the high-weight issues issueD and issueE.

At t=0.24 I am still targeting a fairly high utility while making a modest additional concession from my prior bid, mainly on lower-to-mid importance issues rather than issueD/issueE. The opponent’s offers remain quite low for me and inconsistent, though they have occasionally conceded on issueD/issueE, so I am holding firm on those high-weight issues while improving the chance of agreement by offering valueA on issueA/issueB and valueC on issueC.

I am targeting a utility around 0.74, making a modest concession from my prior stance while still protecting the high-weight issues, especially issueE. The opponent has only slowly improved their offers to me and is still far below acceptable utility, so at t=0.26 I should not concede too aggressively, but I can test flexibility by lowering issueD one step while keeping issueE strong.

I am targeting a utility around 0.72, continuing gradual concessions while it is still relatively early at t=0.28 and preserving value on the most important issues, especially issueE and issueD. The opponent’s offers remain low for my utility, though they have occasionally moved on issueB and issueE, so I concede mostly on lower-weight issues and partially on issueC while keeping a strong position on the highest-weight issues.

I am targeting about 0.70 utility: a modest concession from my previous 0.72 while still protecting the high-weight issues, especially issueE and issueD. At t=0.30 there is no need to rush to the opponent’s much lower offers, though they have made small concessions on issueB/issueC/issueD/issueE, so I am conceding mainly on low-weight issueA and issueB plus some on issueC.

At t=0.32 I am still targeting a relatively high utility around 0.72, since there is time left and the opponent’s offers remain much worse for me despite some movement on issueD and issueE. I am holding firm on the high-weight issueE and issueD, while making concessions on lower-weight issueA and issueB and keeping issueC moderate; the opponent has repeatedly signaled low values on A/B/C but has occasionally moved on D/E.

I am targeting about 0.70 utility, conceding mainly on the lower-weight issues A and B while still protecting the high-weight D and E. At t=0.34 there is still time, so I should not fall to the opponent’s current best offer for me, though their latest bid shows some movement by offering valueE on issueE and valueB on issueA. I will respond with a moderate concession that keeps issueE strong and leaves room for later movement.

At t=0.36 I am still targeting a fairly strong utility around 0.72, since there is time left and the opponent has only modestly improved offers. Their latest bid shows willingness to put issueE at valueE and issueB at valueB, so I preserve my high-weight issueD/issueE positions while conceding mainly on lower-weight issueA/issueB and holding issueC at a moderate value.

I targeted about 0.72 utility, keeping strong positions on the high-weight issues D and E while giving flexibility on the lower-weight A and B. At t=0.38 there is still time, so I am not dropping to the opponent’s best signaled bid yet; their offers have improved somewhat but remain well below my recent proposals. I used their latest willingness on issueA/valueB and issueB/valueA as a low-cost concession pattern while preserving value on the important issues.

I am targeting about 0.70 utility, which is a moderate mid-game concession while still preserving value on the high-weight issues D and E. The opponent has begun offering stronger values on issueD and occasionally issueE, including issueD=valueE in the latest bid, so I am matching that signal while conceding A and B fully and reducing E from my prior demand. With time at 0.40, I should broaden the tradeoff space but not yet drop to the opponent’s low-utility offers.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.72, continuing to protect the high-weight issues D and E while making concessions on lower-weight A and B. The opponent has started offering valueE on issueD and has sometimes moved up on issueE, but remains very low on issueC, so this bid uses their signaled flexibility on D/E while only moderately conceding C.

I targeted about 0.70 utility, making a modest mid-game concession from my prior bids while still protecting the high-weight issuesD and issueE. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat for me, especially with occasional concessions on issueD/issueE, but their latest bid is still only around 0.48 utility to me, so I should not drop too far yet.

I targeted about 0.70 utility, maintaining strong outcomes on the high-weight issues while conceding some ground on issueD and the lower-weight issues. At t=0.46 there is some pressure to move toward a workable compromise, and the opponent’s latest offer signals willingness on issueE=valueE and issueB=valueC but continued resistance on issueC and issueD, so I am trading off by lowering issueD while keeping issueE high.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.68: I concede on lower/moderate-weight issues A, B, and C while holding relatively firm on high-weight issues D and E. The opponent’s offers have improved only gradually for me, but their latest bid includes issueB: valueD and they have previously shown willingness to offer high values on D or E, so this bid incorporates that signal without over-conceding before the deadline.

I am targeting about 0.70 utility: a meaningful mid-game concession while still protecting the high-weight issueE and keeping issueD acceptable. The opponent’s offers have improved only slowly and remain low for me, but they have shown willingness to offer higher values on issueB, issueC, issueD, and sometimes issueE, so I am testing a tradeoff that concedes issueD somewhat while matching their recent higher issueC/issueB signals.

I am targeting about 0.68 utility, making a modest concession from my previous offer while staying above the opponent’s last offer value to me. At t=0.52 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept their 0.62 offer outright; their recent bids show real movement on issueC and issueD, so I concede low-weight issueA/issueB and ask for a moderate improvement on issueE. No opponent messages were provided.

I am targeting about 0.62 utility by conceding mainly on lower-weight issues A/B and partially on high-weight issueE while preserving good outcomes on issueC and issueD. At t=0.54 there is meaningful time pressure, and the opponent recently offered this exact valid combination at t=0.52, so it is a credible acceptance candidate despite their latest backslide.
